owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

createBatchWithSupplier(uint256,uint256,.notice: Create a batch with an assigned supplier.

createShippingInvitation(uint256,address.notice: Create a new shipping invitation for a batch. Only workspace members can create invitations.

createSupplyInvitation(uint256,address,u.notice: Create a new supply invitation for a batch. Only workspace members can create invitations.

getShippingInvitation(uint256).notice: Get the details of a shipping invitation by its ID.

getShippingInvitationsByBatch(uint256).notice: Get the list of shipping invitation IDs for a batch.

getSupplyInvitation(uint256).notice: Get the details of a supply invitation by its ID.

getSupplyInvitationsByBatch(uint256).notice: Get the list of supply invitation IDs for a batch.

setAssignedTransporterForBatch(uint256,a.notice: Update transporterAssignmentStatus of batch to Assigned and create a shipping invitation for the assigned transporter. Only workspace members can call this function.

updateStatusShippingInvitationAssigned(u.notice: Update the status of a shipping invitation. Only the invited transporter can update the status.

updateStatusShippingInvitationBidding(ui.notice: Update the status of a shipping invitation to Won. Only the workspace owner can update the status.

updateStatusSupplyInvitationAssigned(uin.notice: Update the status of a supply invitation. Only the invited supplier can update the status.

updateStatusSupplyInvitationBidding(uint.notice: Update the status of a supply invitation to Won. Only the workspace owner can update the status.
